---
title: "오픈 통계 패키지"
subtitle: "BitStat2"
fig-format: svg
editor:
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
listing:
  - id: stat-data
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - 01_data
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png
  - id: stat-eda
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - 02_eda
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png
  - id: stat-viz
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - 03_viz
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png    
  - id: stat-testing
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - 04_testing
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png    
  - id: stat-infer
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - 05_infer
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png
  - id: stat-theory
    max-items: 3
    contents: 
      - 06_theory
    sort: "date-modified desc" 
    type: grid
    image-placeholder: images/BitStat.png    
---

# [데이터](01_data.qmd)

::: {#stat-data}
:::


# [EDA](02_eda.qmd)

::: {#stat-eda}
:::

# [시각화](03_viz.qmd)

::: {#stat-viz}
:::


# [통계검정](04_testing.qmd)

::: {#stat-testing}
:::

# [추론](05_infer.qmd)

::: {#stat-infer}
:::


# [이론](06_theory.qmd)

::: {#stat-theory}
:::
